title: The Egghead Siege Begins

dialogue.text: Get away from the Pacific- TAS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator

dialogue.text: "Kairousek!" has the proper- ty of sticking together

dialogue.text: 1.5 The tires of this "vegatank" are made of Karol sexi, so they won't fall!!

dialogue.text: Has my lady radar ever been wrong?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if the speed of this tank doesn't catch up with my restless heart, I'll go ahead!!
